sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n52180" key="kakoe/peia" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κᾰκο-έπεια</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n52180.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">bad language, blasphemy</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author></bibl>, (in form <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">-πία</foreign>) <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Phot.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
